text.data-narration: Software engineering is the application of engineering principles and techniques to the development of software systems.

g.text: Software engineering is the application of engineering principles and techniques to the development of software systems.

text.data-narration: Software engineering is a field of study that deals with the planning, design, development, testing, and maintenance of software systems.

g.text: Software engineering is a field of study that deals with the planning, design, development, testing, and maintenance of software systems.

text.data-narration: It involves the use of systematic approaches, tools, and techniques to improve the quality, reliability, and maintainability of software systems.

g.text: It involves the use of systematic approaches, tools, and techniques to improve the quality, reliability, and maintainability of software systems.

text.data-narration: Agile methodologies are iterative development approaches that emphasize flexibility, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

g.text: Agile methodologies are iterative development approaches that emphasize flexibility, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

text.data-narration: They use iterative development cycles to deliver working software in short intervals.

g.text: They use iterative development cycles to deliver working software in short intervals.

text.data-narration: Software engineering principles are guidelines and best practices that govern the development of software systems.

g.text: Software engineering principles are guidelines and best practices that govern the development of software systems.

text.data-narration: They provide a framework for software development that ensures quality, reliability, and maintainability.

g.text: They provide a framework for software development that ensures quality, reliability, and maintainability.

text.data-narration: The software engineering process is a systematic approach to developing software systems.

g.text: The software engineering process is a systematic approach to developing software systems.

text.data-narration: It involves the following stages: requirements gathering, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance.

g.text: It involves the following stages: requirements gathering, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance.

text.data-narration: Requirements gathering involves identifying, analyzing, and documenting the requirements of the software system.

g.text: Requirements gathering involves identifying, analyzing, and documenting the requirements of the software system.
